data.body: Update MetadataEntryInput and metadata_entry_from_input to accept optional LeaseReference. Update MetadataEntry::from_input to propagate lease_ref. Update collect_note and collect_handoff to pass knot lease_id as LeaseReference. Update apply_step_transition to construct LeaseReference. Update event JSON payloads.
data.title: WP3: Creation path updates — wire LeaseReference through note/handoff/step creation
